mapper.select:
SELECT 账户编号 AS accountId, 账户编码 AS accountCode, 账户名称 AS accountName, 账户类型 AS accountType, 是否启用 AS enabled FROM FUND_ACCOUNT WHERE 是否启用 = 1
AND 账户编号 IN
#{id}
ORDER BY 账户编号 ASC

SELECT b.账户编号 AS accountId, b.期初余额 AS initialBalance, CONCAT(p.年份, '-', LPAD(CAST(p.月份 AS CHAR), 2, '0'), '-01') AS periodStart FROM FUND_ACCOUNT_INITIAL_BALANCE b INNER JOIN FUND_PERIOD p ON p.账期编号 = b.账期编号 INNER JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN #{useLatestClosedPeriodFallback} AND latest.latestYear IS NOT NULL AND DATE(CONCAT(req.reqYear, '-', LPAD(req.reqMonth, 2, '0'), '-01')) > DATE(CONCAT(latest.latestYear, '-', LPAD(latest.latestMonth, 2, '0'), '-01')) THEN latest.latestYear ELSE req.reqYear END AS chosenYear, CASE WHEN #{useLatestClosedPeriodFallback} AND latest.latestMonth IS NOT NULL AND DATE(CONCAT(req.reqYear, '-', LPAD(req.reqMonth, 2, '0'), '-01')) > DATE(CONCAT(latest.latestYear, '-', LPAD(latest.latestMonth, 2, '0'), '-01')) THEN latest.latestMonth ELSE req.reqMonth END AS chosenMonth FROM ( SELECT YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS reqYear, MONTH(STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS reqMonth ) req LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p2.年份 AS latestYear, p2.月份 AS latestMonth FROM FUND_PERIOD p2 WHERE p2.是否已结账 = 1 AND DATE(CONCAT(p2.年份, '-', LPAD(p2.月份, 2, '0'), '-01')) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY p2.年份 DESC, p2.月份 DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest ON 1 = 1 ) period_choice ON p.年份 = period_choice.chosenYear AND p.月份 = period_choice.chosenMonth WHERE b.账户编号 IN
#{id}
